⚱️ Zul'Farrak

"Sandfury troll capital in Tanaris — a fortified ziggurat city culminating in the pyramid event where Sergeant Bly and the prisoners hold the troll horde at bay."

🎯 Z Loot Summary

Equipment Focus: Sandfury troll patterns and the pyramid event — Sang'thraze and Jang'thraze sword pair, Carrot on a Stick, and a rare Zulian Tiger mount from Chief Ukorz.

  • Best for: Level 44-54
  • Run time: 50-75 minutes
  • Mob levels: 43-46
  • Famous for: Carrot on a Stick (Ukorz), the dual swords, Sandfury Tiger mount, Mudsprocket quests
  • Includes: Sandfury Executioner stairs, the pyramid event (Bly+prisoners hold off troll waves), Hydromancer pool
